variants.title: Donaldson X007297 Air Filter Kit
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson X007297 Air Filter Kit includes all necessary components for efficient air filtration, ensuring clean airflow to the engine. It provides reliable protection against airborne contaminants. Suitable for a range of applications, this air filter kit enhances engine performance and extends service intervals.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF490M Air, Secondary | Replaces the Donaldson X007297
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF490M radial seal secondary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
